name: smart-ops-system
description: Smart Internal Operations Management System Monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix backend & npm run dev --prefix frontend ; wait
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
